meta.title: Loïc Muller — Full-Stack Web Developer, Freelance
meta.description: Portfolio of Loïc Muller, freelance full-stack web developer based in Lyon, France.

hero.name: Loïc Muller
hero.title: Full-Stack Web Developer, Freelance
hero.tagline: I build, optimize and maintain web applications.

about.heading: About
paragraphs: Full-stack web developer based in Lyon, France. I taught myself to code before completing a certified training program, then spent over three years working in demanding technical environments.
I've built internal applications, REST APIs, micro-services, asynchronous processing pipelines and search engines. I've also taken over, refactored and improved existing applications.
My approach: I don't just execute tasks — I think through architecture and maintainability upfront. I'd rather invest more time in design to save time on testing and long-term maintenance.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.emptyState: New projects coming soon. Stay tuned.

items.title: Custom application development
items.description: Design and development of web applications tailored to your business needs, from backend to user interface.

items.title: API design and development
items.description: Robust, documented and secure REST APIs to power your applications or integrate with third-party services.

items.title: Maintenance and evolution
items.description: Taking over existing applications, fixing bugs, refactoring and adding new features.

items.title: Optimization and refactoring
items.description: Improving performance, code readability and architecture for easier long-term maintenance.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.text: Have a project in mind or a question? Feel free to reach out.
